svg.title: v1.0 release gate app icon artifact hardening evidence
svg.desc: Visual evidence that the v1.0 release artifact preflight now rejects signed app zip artifacts missing Contents/Resources/AppIcon.icns and passes the current artifact-only gate when the icon is present.
svg.text: v1.0 release gate: AppIcon.icns artifact check
2026-06-23 — final LithePG.app.zip must contain a safe Resources/AppIcon.icns

g.text: test_v10_release_gate first accepted an iconless signed artifact
artifact-only gate now reports: Release artifact app icon: missing
current dist/LithePG.app.zip reports: Release artifact app icon: present
test_v10_release_gate, test_create_release_zip, swift build, swift test all passed
dogfood_check could not run: Docker unavailable in this cron environment

svg.text: External v1.0 blockers remain: credentials, security contact, Homebrew tap, CI readiness, and approvals.
